PARTIAL TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2107-PS
1936 PRESSISCHE GESETZSAMMLUNG, PAGE 21-22.
(No. 14308) Law on the Secret State Police of 10 February 1936
Section VII
Orders in matters of the Secret State Police are not subject to the review of the Administrative Courts.
Berlin, 10 February 1936
THE PRUSSIAN STATE MINISTRY
GOERING
FRICK
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
